section.heading: Deputy Comptroller for the supervision and examination of Federal savings associations

content.p: The Comptroller of the Currency shall designate a Deputy Comptroller, who shall be responsible for the supervision and examination of Federal savings associations.

section.sourceCredit: (R.S. § 327B, as added Pub. L. 111–203, title III, § 314(b), July 21, 2010, 124 Stat. 1524.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on the transfer date, see section 314(d) of Pub. L. 111–203, set out as an Effective Date of 2010 Amendment note under section 1 of this title.
